title: NLP-004-explain-part-of-speech-pos-tagging-and-its-significance.
author: AI 面试题库
abstract:
NLP-004 Explain Part-of-Speech (POS) tagging and its significance.

 4. Explain Part-of-Speech (POS) tagging and its significance.
答案要点:
- 定义: 为每个词标注语法类别（名词、动词、形容词等）
- 重要性:
  - Syntactic Parsing 的基础
  - Word Sense Disambiguation
  - Information Extraction
  - Lemmatization 需要 POS 信息
- 挑战: 一词多性（"well" 可以是副词/形容词/名词）
- 工具: NLTK, spaCy, Stanford POS Tagger

质量评分: 91/100 ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

---

---

Difficulty: ⭐⭐⭐
Category: NLP...
